intendedFor: Kongregate-style portals that reject third-party advertising inside uploaded games.
Feedback portals where a clean static package is safer than an ad-SDK package.
Manual email submissions that ask for a playable ZIP without monetization SDKs.

checks.evidence: No third-party game/ad provider URL or provider string remains.
No remote metrics or server API calls remain.
No external hyperlinks remain in the uploaded game package.
No ad runtime calls remain in clean game logic.
index.html is at the archive root.
Platform adapter is a local clean stub.

uploadNotes: Use this clean ZIP when a portal bans third-party ad SDKs, sponsorships, external links, account systems, or remote tracking.
Use the regular platform ZIP only when the portal explicitly asks for its SDK adapter.
This package contains index.html at the archive root and runs without server calls.
